question: Create a bar chart of avg GDP growth by year

messages.content: Create a bar chart of avg GDP growth by year

data.label: Thinking...
data.detail: Running Python: import altair as alt...

args.code:
import altair as alt

# Query average GDP growth by year
df = _db.execute("""
    SELECT 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM quarter) as year,
        AVG(gdp_growth_pct) as avg_gdp_growth
    FROM us_quarterly_macro_0047798b
    GROUP BY year
    ORDER BY year
""").df()

# Create bar chart
chart = alt.Chart(df).mark_bar().encode(
    x=alt.X('year:O', title='Year'),
    y=alt.Y('avg_gdp_growth:Q', title='Average GDP Growth (%)'),
    color=alt.Color('year:O', scale=alt.Scale(domain=sorted(df['year'].unique())))
).properties(
    title='Average GDP Growth by Year',
    width=600,
    height=400
)

save_chart_vegalite(chart, "Average GDP Growth by Year")
